# Mayur Chaudhari

> AI Business Transformation Manager helping organizations unlock productivity through Agentic AI, workflow automation, and intelligent digital systems.

Mayur Chaudhari is an AI Business Transformation Manager focused on connecting business problems with AI-powered solutions. He designs systems that improve operations, automate repetitive work, and create scalable business outcomes. Currently leading AI Transformation at EDGE, he specializes in multi-agent systems, business process automation, AI strategy consulting, and cross-platform development with Flutter.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Portfolio and landing page with services overview, experience, expertise, projects, and contact information.

## Optional

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mayuro/): Professional profile and network.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/mayuro): Open-source projects and code repositories.
